chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 314 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.10.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Tariq Hameed Qureshi, Advocate for respondents No.5 & 7. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.5 & 7 has filed a statement stating that out of Rs.13,02,315/-, an amount of Rs.3,00,000/- has been paid to the petitioner. He undertakes that remaining amount of Rs.10,23,015/- will be paid to her in four equal monthly installments. Learned Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of in view of above undertaking. However, the default in payment will expose the concerned respondent(s) to contempt proceedings. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
